servicesPage.intro: From plumbing emergencies to HVAC tune-ups and duct cleaning, we offer a full range of home services in Dallas, TX. All work is backed by our satisfaction guarantee.

services.title: Plumbing Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert plumbing services for leaks, clogs, water heaters, and more.
services.longDescription: Whether it's a dripping faucet or a burst pipe, our licensed plumbers diagnose and fix the issue fast. We handle everything from simple repairs to full repiping and water heater installations.
benefits: Upfront pricing with no hidden fees

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue thoroughly and explain the problem in plain terms.

process.title: Quote
process.description: You receive a detailed, written estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Our technician completes the repair efficiently and cleans up afterward.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency plumbing services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency plumbing services. Call (469) 864-6982 for immediate assistance.

faqs.question: How long does a typical water heater installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed in 2-4 hours, depending on the complexity.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable electrical repairs, upgrades, and installations.
services.longDescription: From flickering lights to full panel upgrades, our electricians ensure your home is safe and up to code. We specialize in outlet installation, wiring, lighting, and more.
benefits: Safety inspections included with every job

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your electrical system and identify any hazards or needs.

process.title: Plan
process.description: We provide a clear plan and cost estimate, including any permits required.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Our team completes the work safely and tests everything before leaving.

faqs.question: Can you install EV chargers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install Level 2 EV chargers for homes and businesses. Call for a quote.

faqs.question: Do you offer electrical panel upgrades?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We upgrade old panels to meet modern electrical demands and improve safety.

services.title: Air Conditioning Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Keep your home cool with professional AC services.
services.longDescription: Our HVAC technicians are experts in AC repair, maintenance, and installation. We work with all major brands and offer energy-efficient options to lower your utility bills.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your system to identify the root cause of the problem.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We explain your options, from simple repairs to full replacement, with transparent pricing.

process.title: Service
process.description: We perform the repair or installation and ensure your system runs efficiently.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend annual maintenance to keep your system running efficiently and prevent breakdowns.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for new AC installations?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options. Contact us for details.

services.title: Vent Duct Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Improve indoor air quality with professional duct cleaning.
services.longDescription: Clean ducts are essential for healthy indoor air. Our duct cleaning service removes dust, allergens, and debris, improving airflow and reducing energy costs.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect your ductwork with a camera to assess cleanliness and identify issues.

process.title: Cleaning
process.description: Using HEPA-filtered equipment, we clean all supply and return ducts thoroughly.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We test airflow and ensure no debris remains, leaving your home clean.

faqs.question: How often should I have my ducts cleaned?
faqs.answer: Every 3-5 years, or more frequently if you have pets, allergies, or recent renovations.

faqs.question: Does duct cleaning reduce energy bills?
faqs.answer: Yes, clean ducts improve airflow, allowing your HVAC system to run more efficiently and potentially lowering energy costs.

about.headline: Dallas's Home Service Experts Since 2008
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with reliable, transparent, and high-quality plumbing, electrical, HVAC, and duct cleaning services – all from one trusted team.
story: Highland Park TX Service was founded with a simple mission: deliver exceptional home services with honesty and integrity. What started as a small plumbing operation has grown into a full-service company covering plumbing, electrical, HVAC, and duct cleaning. We've earned the trust of thousands of Dallas homeowners by showing up on time, communicating clearly, and doing the job right the first time.

Today, we continue to invest in our team and equipment to provide the best possible service. Every technician is trained to treat your home with respect, and we stand behind every job with a satisfaction guarantee. Whether it's a minor repair or a major installation, we're here to help.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and say what we do. No shortcuts, no surprises.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use the best materials and techniques to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with the utmost respect.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and get the job done efficiently.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form for a free estimate.
